{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Governor Brown has included $60 million from Prop 98 to fund basic skills innovation in California's community college system.",
    "California's community college system has an opportunity for a targeted one-time investment that will have a long-term impact on students' lives and success.",
    "Over 70% of students enrolling in California’s community colleges for the first time are deemed unprepared and in need of remedial basic skills courses.",
    "In early efforts that served as the model for the bill’s language, students’ completion rates for college-level English courses more than doubled compared to those in traditional remediation.",
    "Completion rates for college-level mathematics increased more than four times for students compared to those in traditional remediation."
  ]
}
